Nearby theorems
Mirrors  >  Home  >  MPE Home  >  Th. List  >  sselid Structured version   Visualization version   GIF version
Theorem sselid 3934
Description: Membership inference from subclass relationship. (Contributed by NM, 25-Jun-2014.)
Hypotheses
Ref Expression
sseli.1 ⊢ 𝐴 ⊆ 𝐵
sselid.2 ⊢ (𝜑 → 𝐶 ∈ 𝐴)
Assertion
Ref Expression
sselid ⊢ (𝜑 → 𝐶 ∈ 𝐵)
Proof of Theorem sselid
StepHypRef Expression
1 sselid.2 . 2 ⊢ (𝜑 → 𝐶 ∈ 𝐴)
2 sseli.1 . . 3 ⊢ 𝐴 ⊆ 𝐵
32sseli 3932 . 2 ⊢ (𝐶 ∈ 𝐴 → 𝐶 ∈ 𝐵)
41, 3syl 17 1 ⊢ (𝜑 → 𝐶 ∈ 𝐵)
Colors of variables: wff setvar class
Syntax hints:   → wi 4   ∈ wcel 2142   ⊆ wss 3904
This theorem was proved from axioms:  ax-mp 5  ax-1 6  ax-2 7  ax-3 8  ax-gen 1815  ax-4 1829  ax-5 1930  ax-6 1987  ax-7 2028  ax-8 2144
This theorem depends on definitions:  df-bi 209  df-an 400  df-ex 1800  df-clel 2837  df-ss 3921
